chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. Cr. Misc. Appln. No.S- 37 of 2021 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of main case. 24.02.2021. Mr. Abdul Aziz, advocate for applicant. Ms. Safa Hisbani, A.P.G for the State. = It is stated by the learned counsel for the applicant that the applicant is being harassed by the respondents to be involved in false cases, therefore, they be restrained from doing so by way of instant Criminal Misc. Application by setting aside of order dated 19.12.2020 passed by learned Ex-officio Justice of Peace/Sessions Judge, Shaheed Benazirabad. 2. Learned A.P.G for the State has sought for the dismissal of the instant Criminal Misc. Application by contending that it is misconceived. 3. I have considered the above arguments and perused the record. 4. The recording of FIR of the incident is a legal function; therefore, its registration could not be prevented by putting the restraint upon the officials. No illegality even otherwise is pointed out in impugned order, which may justify making interferent with it by this Court. Consequently, instant Criminal Misc. Application being misconceived is dismissed accordingly. JUDGE Ahmed/Pa
